title: cynanchum sublanceolatum f. albiflorum
intro: Cynanchum sublanceolatum f. albiflorum, also known as the white-flowered wolf's milkvine, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum sublanceolatum f. albiflorum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are sometimes used in modern pharmaceutical products.
